root_cause_identification.expected_solution: The root cause is in containerd's pkg/unpack/unpacker.go. When pulling with WithPullUnpack, the unpacker's doUnpackFn closure checks if a snapshot already exists for each layer by calling sn.Stat(ctx, chainID). If the snapshot exists (error is nil), it returns nil immediately — skipping both snapshot preparation and content fetch. The content fetch goroutine is only started after sn.Prepare succeeds, so it is never reached. On the moby side, daemon/containerd/image_pull.go unconditionally passes containerd.WithPullUnpack in the pullTag function (around line 196), enabling this buggy codepath for all pulls. When two images share base layers, the first pull creates snapshots and stores content. The second pull finds existing snapshots and skips content fetch entirely, leaving the content store without the layer blobs for the second image.
evaluation_criteria: Must identify containerd's unpacker (pkg/unpack/unpacker.go or the unpack package) as the location of the bug
Must explain the snapshot existence check (sn.Stat on chainID, or sn.Prepare returning AlreadyExists) causes early return
Must mention that content/blob fetch is skipped when snapshot exists
Must identify moby's daemon/containerd/image_pull.go as enabling this via WithPullUnpack

error_chain_trace.expected_solution: Error chain: (1) docker pull invokes moby's pullTag in daemon/containerd/image_pull.go, which unconditionally appends containerd.WithPullUnpack. (2) containerd's client/pull.go creates an Unpacker when pullCtx.Unpack is true and attaches it to the handler chain. (3) The unpacker iterates over layers and calls doUnpackFn for each. (4) doUnpackFn first checks sn.Stat(ctx, chainID) — if the snapshot exists, it returns nil without proceeding to sn.Prepare or content fetch. (5) Even via the sn.Prepare path, if AlreadyExists is returned and chainID is found via sn.Stat, it returns nil. (6) Because the content fetch goroutine is only started after sn.Prepare succeeds, it is never initialized for already-existing snapshots. (7) The content store never receives the layer blob. (8) When docker save is called, moby's ExportImage in daemon/containerd/image_exporter.go uses archive.WithSkipMissing, which silently skips the missing blobs, producing an incomplete archive.
evaluation_criteria: Must trace through moby's image_pull.go showing WithPullUnpack usage
Must identify containerd's client/pull.go as the bridge that creates the Unpacker
Must identify pkg/unpack/unpacker.go as containing the snapshot existence check that skips content fetch
Must explain the content store gap (snapshot exists but blob missing)
Must mention the export/save path where missing content causes incomplete archives

affected_services.expected_solution: Affected components: (1) moby daemon/containerd/image_pull.go — pullTag function that passes WithPullUnpack. (2) moby daemon/containerd/image_exporter.go — ExportImage that silently skips missing blobs. (3) containerd pkg/unpack/unpacker.go — doUnpackFn with the snapshot existence early return. (4) containerd client/pull.go — Pull function that creates the Unpacker. (5) containerd content store — missing layer blobs. (6) containerd snapshotter — has snapshots that mask the missing content.
evaluation_criteria: Must name at least 3 specific Go source files across both repos
Must include containerd pkg/unpack/unpacker.go (or equivalent path)
Must identify the content store and snapshotter as separate subsystems involved

remediation_proposal.expected_solution: Remediation: (1) In moby daemon/containerd/image_pull.go, do not use WithPullUnpack for local snapshotters like overlayfs — only use it for remote snapshotters where deferred layer download is actually needed. This ensures that for local snapshotters, all layer blobs are fetched to the content store during pull regardless of snapshot state. (2) Alternatively or additionally, fix containerd's unpacker to decouple content fetch from snapshot existence — even when a snapshot already exists, the layer blob should still be fetched into the content store so that save/push operations work correctly.
evaluation_criteria: Must reference moby's image_pull.go as the place to change WithPullUnpack behavior
Must distinguish between local snapshotters (overlayfs) and remote snapshotters
Must propose ensuring layer content is always fetched to the content store
Must address the root cause rather than just the symptom (not just fixing the export path)
